title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Philips India Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Philips India Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!
